task: I need to send a quick note to my supervisor about a schedule change before the shift starts. Can you help me put together a short message that covers the basics and is easy to send?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a short, easy-to-send version:

**Hi [Supervisor’s Name], I wanted to let you know before my shift starts that I have a schedule change and won’t be able to make it for the full shift. Sorry for the inconvenience, and please let me know if you need anything else from me.**

If you want, I can make it:
- more casual
- more professional
- even shorter for text message style

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short and clear. I can use that.
